tagline: Engineering Excellence in Nigeria's Energy Sector

sections.name: Hero
sections.copy:
Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited

Engineering Excellence in Nigeria's Energy Sector

Leading provider of comprehensive petroleum engineering services and energy solutions across Nigeria. With deep technical expertise and a commitment to operational excellence, we deliver reliable energy services that power progress.
sections.imagePrompt: Photorealistic wide shot of a modern Nigerian oil and gas facility at golden hour, with industrial pipelines, storage tanks, and technical equipment gleaming in warm sunlight, professional workers in safety gear visible in the background, clean industrial aesthetic with blue sky and hints of green Nigerian landscape, corporate photography style, high-end industrial photography

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
About Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited

Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited (also trading as Eddie Dee Petroleum Services Co) is a leading Nigerian oil and gas services company headquartered in Sagamu, Ogun State. Founded and led by experienced petroleum engineers, we bring world-class technical expertise to Nigeria's dynamic energy sector.

Our company is built on a foundation of engineering excellence, safety consciousness, and unwavering commitment to client satisfaction. We understand the unique challenges of operating in Nigeria's oil and gas industry and provide solutions that are both technically sound and commercially viable.

With our strategic location in Ogun State and deep knowledge of Nigerian petroleum operations, we serve clients across the upstream, midstream, and downstream sectors. Our team combines international best practices with local expertise to deliver exceptional results on every project.

At Eddie Dee Energy Resources, we don't just provide services—we build lasting partnerships with our clients, supporting their growth and contributing to Nigeria's energy independence.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional corporate photograph of a Nigerian petroleum engineering office, modern workspace with technical drawings and engineering equipment visible, diverse team of Nigerian engineers in business attire collaborating around a large table with petroleum industry documents and laptops, natural lighting through large windows, contemporary Nigerian office interior, corporate documentary style photography

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
Comprehensive Petroleum Engineering Services

Petroleum Engineering Consultancy
Expert technical advisory services covering reservoir engineering, production optimization, well design, and field development planning. Our petroleum engineers provide data-driven insights to maximize asset value and operational efficiency.

Energy Solutions & Supply
Reliable supply of petroleum products and energy solutions tailored to industrial, commercial, and institutional clients across Nigeria. We ensure consistent product quality and timely delivery.

Technical Training & Capacity Building
Specialized training programs for oil and gas professionals, covering industry best practices, safety protocols, and emerging technologies in the petroleum sector.

Project Management Services
End-to-end project management for oil and gas operations, from feasibility studies and engineering design to execution and commissioning. We deliver projects on time and within budget.

Equipment Supply & Maintenance
Procurement and maintenance of petroleum industry equipment, tools, and technologies. We source quality equipment and provide ongoing technical support.

Health, Safety & Environmental Services
Comprehensive HSE management services ensuring compliance with Nigerian and international standards. We prioritize safety in all operations while minimizing environmental impact.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional montage-style photograph showing various aspects of Nigerian petroleum operations: close-up of engineer reviewing technical diagrams, petroleum storage facilities, safety equipment and gear, modern control room with monitoring screens, all set against Nigerian industrial backdrop, bright professional lighting, clean corporate photography style with blue and orange accent tones

sections.name: Our Expertise
sections.copy:
Led by Experienced Petroleum Engineers

Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited is led by qualified petroleum engineers with extensive experience in Nigeria's oil and gas industry. Our leadership team brings decades of combined expertise in petroleum engineering, operations management, and business development.

Our founder's background as a practicing petroleum engineer ensures that technical excellence remains at the core of everything we do. This engineering-first approach means our clients benefit from solutions that are not only commercially sound but technically robust.

We maintain a team of skilled professionals including petroleum engineers, process engineers, HSE specialists, and project managers—all committed to delivering world-class service to Nigeria's energy sector.

Our team stays current with industry developments through continuous professional development and maintains memberships in relevant professional bodies. This commitment to excellence has earned us the trust of clients across Nigeria's oil and gas industry.

sections.name: Contact Us
sections.copy:
Partner With Us

Ready to discuss your petroleum engineering needs or energy solutions requirements? Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited is here to support your operations with technical excellence and reliable service.

Our team is available to provide consultations, project quotations, and technical advisory services. Whether you're planning a new project or seeking to optimize existing operations, we bring the expertise and commitment to help you succeed.

Visit our office in Sagamu, Ogun State, or reach out through any of the channels below. We look forward to partnering with you.

Eddie Dee Energy Resources Limited
